title: myristica fatua subsp. affinis
intro: Myristica fatua subsp. affinis, also known as a variant of the nutmeg plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myristicaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide pain relief, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine practices in various parts of the world.
